titleStmt.title: SII 30.179: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 179. (A.R. No. 257 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the east wall of the maṇḍapa Rājēndra-Chōḻa II: year 3, day 133: 1055 A.D.

summary.p: Beginning badly damaged. It records the decision to purchase 1126 kuḻi of land in two pieces in the name of Ādichaṇḍēsvara taken by Mahāsabha in the meeting held in the temple maṇḍapa for the expenses of worship (archanābhōga). Boundaries of both lands are also mentioned. Names of channels such as Manaṟpākka-vati, Paramēsvaravāykkāl and Rājamallapperu-vati are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged
kopparakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār rājen=taradevaṟki yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu
nāḷ nūṟṟu muppattu muṉṟināl jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu tāmar nāṭṭu parākkiramacoḻac caruppeti maṅkalattu mahāsabhaip peru
ṅkuṟi perumakkaḷom nammūr śrīpon=tai Uṭaiya mādevar rukkai maṇṭapattu kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu śrīpontai koyil tiruvārātanai ceyu
m canāl śrīpontaiyuṭaiyār Āticaṇṭeśvarar pakkal koṇṭa patum koṇṭu Ittevar Ivvūryāḷuṅ kaṇattāruḷ ka
vaṇiyaṉ viracoḻa ceri māyil kāmakkoṭṭakkramavittan pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya pūmi maṇaṟpākkattu vatikku kiḻakku parameśvara vāykkālukku vaṭakku 3 ṅkaṇṇāṟṟu pūmi kuḻimunnū
ṟṟu Orupatteṭṭukkum kiḻpāṟkellai Ittevar pūmikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ma pāttu kecuvacomāci pūmikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai maṇaṟpākkattuvatikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkel
lai vāykkālukkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṉ kellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi muṉṉūṟṟu Orupatteṭṭum Apimāṉameruccaturvvetimaṅkalattu tiruveṅkaṭakra
mavittaṉ pirāmaṇi pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiya pūmi rājamallap peruvatikku meṟkum
mattamakku Eṟiyavatikkut teṟkkum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu ṉṉūṟṟu Eṭṭukkuḻikkum kiḻpāṟkellai
yan paḷḷa vāykkālukku meṟku tenpāṟkellai paḷḷa vāykkālukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai niroṭuvākkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṇ
ṇāṟṟu vāykkālukkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Eṭṭuk kuḻiyum Āka taṭiyiraṇṭiṉāl kuḻi Āyirattoru nūṟṟu Irupattāṟum cantirātitta
varai Ittev(ā)ṟku Arccanāpokamāka Innilattukku sabhaiyome Iṟai Iṟuppomāṉom sabhai Uḷḷeḻutuppariyalūṟ cun=tarakkiramavi
ttaṉum kūṭalūr Iṣikecuvapaṭṭa garabhaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiven Ivvūr kavan sūriya teva �
Digital edition of SII 30.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
